review.heading: Review your changes
review.description: Here's what will be published to your site.
review.up_to_date_description: No changes since your last publish.
review.first_publish_description: All your content will be published for the first time.

education.heading: What does publishing do?
education.body: Publishing saves your changes to GitHub, which is the service that hosts your site. Think of it like saving a document to the cloud — your site will update automatically after publishing.
education.learn_more: Learn more about how this works

glossary.commit: A saved snapshot of your changes — like a save point in a video game.
glossary.repository: The place where all your site's files are stored on GitHub.
glossary.push: Sending your saved changes from the compositor to GitHub.

checks.heading: Pre-publish checks
checks.all_passed_description: Your content is ready to publish.
checks.stale_head: Your site's repository has changed since you last synced. Please re-sync before publishing.
checks.step_no_position: A step has no viewer position recorded

commit.heading: Write a commit message
commit.description: A commit message describes what you changed. It helps you (and others) understand the history of your site.
commit.label: Commit message
commit.footer_note: This message will appear in your site's history on GitHub.

build.phase_build_site: Weaving your stories and objects into web pages...
build.phase_deploy: Publishing your site to the web...
build.success_description: Your changes have been published. If you don't see everything, do a full refresh (Cmd-Shift-R on Mac, Ctrl-Shift-R on Windows) a few times.
build.failed_description: Something went wrong while building your site.
build.stale_head_error: Your repository changed while publishing. Please re-sync and try again.
